sector_2.name: Fishery Port and Stadthafen Rostock
sector_2.surcharge: 25% on Tariff A and Tariff B rates

tariff_a_base_rates.description: Per move and per tug for vessels with operational main engine in Sector 1.

tariff_b_hourly_logic.billing_increments: First 60 minutes or part thereof counts as full hour. Thereafter, time is charged in 30-minute periods.

waiting_time.logic: First half hour is Free of Charge. If delay exceeds 30 minutes, the first hour is charged in full, followed by half-hourly charges of the Hourly rate.
triggers: Assistance not commenced within 30 minutes of firm order
Normal assistance interrupted longer than 30 minutes
Trip in vain: tug not released within 30 minutes

holding_pushing_berth.logic: Minimum 1 hour charge, thereafter charging per 30 minutes or part thereof.
holding_pushing_berth.trigger: Occurs as soon as normal assistance is interrupted and vessel must be held/pushed in position (e.g., at locks, rivers, or bridges).

shifting.logic: Charged per Tug with a minimum of 1 hour, thereafter per 30 minutes or part thereof.

safety_standby.logic: Counts from departure from station until return to station.

wismar_port.description: Assistance in the port of Wismar.
wismar_port.logic: Levied on top of Tariff A and B rates.

evening_weekend_holiday.condition: Applicable if at least 50% of the services are provided outside normal hours.

late_order.description: Orders made with less than 4 hours notice.

ice_breaking.description: Ice breaking or ice breaking assistance.

mobilization_in_vain.description: Cancellation without 1-hour notice or tug dismissed unused.

fuel_surcharge.increment_ratio: 1% surcharge for every 10% price increase above threshold

exclusions.emergency_response: Tariffs do not apply to Emergency Assistance, Salvage, or Vessels broken loose from mooring; separate agreements required.
